scripts.test: bun run test:logs:prepare && CE_LOG_LEVEL=debug CE_LOG_FILE=.context-engine/test-logs/all.log bun test
scripts.test:unit: bun run test:logs:prepare && CE_LOG_LEVEL=debug CE_LOG_FILE=.context-engine/test-logs/unit.log bun test tests/unit/
scripts.test:integration: bun run test:logs:prepare && CE_LOG_LEVEL=debug CE_LOG_FILE=.context-engine/test-logs/integration.log bun test tests/integration/
scripts.test:e2e: bun run test:logs:prepare && CE_LOG_LEVEL=debug CE_LOG_FILE=.context-engine/test-logs/e2e.log bun test tests/e2e/
scripts.test:contract: bun run test:logs:prepare && CE_LOG_LEVEL=debug CE_LOG_FILE=.context-engine/test-logs/contract.log bun test tests/contract/
scripts.test:eval: bun run test:logs:prepare && CE_LOG_LEVEL=debug CE_LOG_FILE=.context-engine/test-logs/eval.log bun test tests/eval/
scripts.test:regression: bun run test:logs:prepare && CE_LOG_LEVEL=debug CE_LOG_FILE=.context-engine/test-logs/regression.log bun test tests/regression/
scripts.test:bench: bun run test:logs:prepare && CE_LOG_LEVEL=debug CE_LOG_FILE=.context-engine/test-logs/bench.log bun test tests/benchmarks/
scripts.test:quality: bun run test:eval && bun run test:bench && bun run test:contract && bun run test:regression
